ruleToc.nextTocUrl:
<js>
var txt = java.getString("#pagestats@text");
var max = 0;
var m = txt.match(/\/(\d+)/);
if (m) max = parseInt(m[1]);
var idMatch = baseUrl.match(/(?:index|books)\/(\d+)/);
var id = idMatch ? idMatch[1] : "";
var list = [];
if (id && max > 1) {
    for (var i = 2; i <= max; i++) {
        list.push("https://www.deqixs.cc/index/" + id + "/" + i);
    }
}
list;
</js>
